turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, mujhe Dr. Suresh Nair ke baare mein puchna tha. Woh is hafte clinic mein hain?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aap Dr. Suresh Nair ki specifically is week ki availability jaanna chahte hain?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, mera unse appointment lena tha. Mujhe pata hai woh visiting consultant hain, toh unke specific days confirm karne the.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Samajh gaya. Yeh main confirm nahi kar sakta is helpline se — visiting consultants ka schedule bahut specific hota hai aur kabhi kabhi change bhi hota hai. Is ke liye hamare reception staff sabse sahi source hain.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Theek hai, unse baat karata hoon.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan zaroor. Main aapko abhi connect karta hoon — let me connect you to our staff right away.
